title: Aurora Cannabis (TSX:ACB) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: MarketBeat analyst forecasts for Aurora Cannabis on Toronto Stock Exchange provide comprehensive outlook for Canadian investors. Current analyst consensus: Price targets range from C$5 to C$10 with consensus estimate around C$7.62. Analyst buy/hold/sell split reflects mixed sentiment with emphasis on execution and international market development. Quarterly earnings expectations: Q1 2026 estimate $0.28 EPS on $69 million revenues. Full year fiscal 2026 estimate -$0.31 EPS on $271.75 million revenues reflecting transition to profitability. Management guidance fiscal 2026: Global medical cannabis net revenue guidance $269-$281 million (10-15% growth). Consolidated adjusted EBITDA guidance $52-$57 million (5-10% YoY growth). Key catalysts: Medical cannabis international revenue growth momentum. Regulatory developments in key markets (Germany, Australia, UK, Poland). Cost control execution and margin expansion. M&A activity and capacity expansion. Valuation metrics: Aurora trading at reasonable valuations for cannabis sector based on revenue growth and adjusted EBITDA generation. FCF generation increasingly important metric as company transitions toward sustainable profitability model. Sentiment: Analysts tracking medical cannabis market opportunity size and Aurora's execution on high-margin product mix shift. International expansion success seen as key determinant of long-term value creation.
